svg.text: Deduplication by DOI + fuzzy title match
OUTPUT DIRS: searches/ · trends/ · downloads/ · deep-dives/ · comparisons/ · reproductions/ · reviews/ · presentations/
Lead agent dispatches specialized sub-agents in parallel via Agent tool
Sub-agents return structured results · Lead agent synthesizes + saves report
Deduplication: DOI match → fuzzy title (≥90%) → prefer published over preprint
Trajectory tags: [NEW] emerging topics · [ONGOING] sustained · [FADING] declining
Biomedical researcher · Disease mechanisms · Therapeutic targets
Drug discovery · Translational research · Spatial transcriptomics
Multi-omics · Deep learning in sequencing · Computational biology
Python deps: matplotlib · seaborn · python-pptx (installed on demand)
tracked_topics · focus_areas · time_span · result_limits · category_filters · detailed_summary_limit
NAMING CONVENTION: YYYY-MM-DD-<sanitized-topic>.md — lowercase · hyphens · no special chars
MULTI-AGENT LITERATURE SEARCH · BIOMEDICAL RESEARCH INTELLIGENCE
